intentSynonyms: look up a feed in starbucks
fetch a single feed in starbucks
view one specific feed in starbucks

description: Get the personalized "For You" feed of promotions, offers, and content from Starbucks. Includes seasonal highlights, new products, and personalized recommendations.

limit.description: Maximum number of feed items to return (default 10)
